text: Deprecated Apollo incident policy from January 2026: use PagerDuty escalation path Beta for checkout pages.
Current Apollo incident policy: checkout alerts use PagerDuty escalation path Gamma. Primary on-call is Mira Chen.
Apollo checkout failover runbook trigger: if writes stall after the primary database recovers, suspect stale PgBouncer DNS cache before changing application code.
Apollo checkout failover fix: restart the PgBouncer deployment and flush the sidecar DNS cache to clear stale primary routing.
Apollo checkout migration owner is Rina Patel from platform engineering.
Apollo checkout migration deadline is April 18, 2026 and the cutover rehearsal is scheduled two days earlier.
The March 17 Apollo checkout outage was caused by stale PgBouncer DNS cache after Postgres failover, not by application deploys.
A separate Apollo recommendation incident in February was caused by Redis eviction pressure in the ranking cache.
Apollo billing operations: Alex Kim owns invoice reconciliation and payment exception review.
Apollo platform engineering: Alex Kim owns the rollout gates service and deployment approvals.
Deprecated Apollo partner API policy: rotate the fulfillment token every 90 days.
Current Apollo partner API policy: rotate the fulfillment token every 30 days and store the checksum in Shield.
Old Apollo finance contact from 2025: finance@apollo.example handled CFO correspondence.
Current Apollo CFO contact email is cfo-office@apollo.example.

Required MemQ operating loop for non-trivial work: call memory_status before execution, use search_memory for semantic recall, use recent_memory for HOT continuity, call add_memory after execution, and call reflect_memory at task or session close.
Dana Morales does not want SMS billing alerts. Notify Dana by email whenever invoice exceptions occur.
Erin Walker prefers SMS for urgent fraud alerts and ignores email after hours.
Current Zephyr incident policy: wallet alerts use PagerDuty escalation path Delta.
Zephyr failover trigger: if writes stall after recovery, inspect WAL archiver backlog before touching PgBouncer.
Zephyr failover fix: restore the WAL archiver worker and re-run replication slot validation.
Zephyr wallet migration owner is Mateo Ruiz from payments infrastructure.
Zephyr wallet migration deadline is May 2, 2026.
Zephyr billing operations: Alex Kim owns chargeback review for merchant payouts.
Current Zephyr partner API policy: rotate the settlement token every 60 days.
Current Zephyr CFO contact email is treasury@zephyr.example.
Dana Morales prefers Slack for merchant payout alerts inside Zephyr.
Current Orion incident policy: logistics alerts use PagerDuty escalation path Sigma.
The Orion dispatch outage was caused by a Kafka consumer group rebalance storm.
Orion dispatch modernization owner is Chloe Bennett from logistics systems.
Current Orion CFO contact email is finance-ops@orion.example.
Current Orion partner API policy: rotate the dispatch token every 45 days.
